svg.text: Braid Work Events, Git Notes, and Orchestrator Intent DB
Numbered sequence with local capture, commit/PR/merge note generation, and durable PR-time event storage.
Agent activity becomes WorkEvent records through hooks and Braid CLI. The daemon writes captured events into Inbox before attach.
Validate shape, assign canonical sequence, dedupe retries, and persist captured work events into Inbox.
Earlier events are not edited; corrections are new events.
A commit anchors a stable Git object. braid attach drains the Inbox work-event slice into braid/thread state, then a curated note can be written.
The PR is the durability boundary: before PR, SQLite is source of truth; after PR, braid/thread records, raw stamped events, PR ids, Git SHAs, and changed-intent deltas live in Intent DB.
PR commits, body/comment edits, review replies, or scope changes
emit changed-intent deltas into Intent DB before merge.
4. Merge Boundary: Promote Status + Merge Note
After PR, Intent DB is source of truth. Merge drains remaining events plus merge SHA, queries Intent DB, updates promote status, and writes the merge note.
Current session owns claim through promote
sets goal, braid intent, optional scope
Current session spawns two sub-agent sessions
hooks capture to Inbox -> commit -> attach
hooks capture to Inbox -> commit -> attach --braid
later PR changes capture intent deltas
Intent DB is queried for truth

Inbox is the pre-attach local FileStore. Before PR, Local SQLite is source of truth. PR drains braid/thread/raw stamped events plus Git refs and commit/head SHAs into Intent DB; every later PR change adds a changed-intent delta; merge drains the final delta plus merge SHA.
